name: Salad Nicoise (Wavermans)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Green beans, green, topped and tails
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans in a pot of boiling water until tender and crisp, about 2-3 minutes. Refresh with cold water and dry.
2. In a large pot of salted water, bring the potatoes to a boil. Cook until tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Combine the green beans, potatoes, tuna, and tomatoes in a large bowl.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the Dijon mustard, garlic, and vinegar. Slowly add the olive oil, then parsley and chives. Season with pepper.
5. Pour the dressing over the ingredients and toss to combine.
6. Top with sliced eggs, anchovy fillets, and additional sliced eggs.
